federation.service: Trust framework (R9 O2/R3 — the signed membership challenge above the registry's fedreg:assertedBy)
federation.membershipTodo: SDK (not an app). issueMembershipCredential() signs 'app X is a member of federation F with status S, asserted by authority A' as a W3C VC 2.0 fedtrust:MembershipCredential (Data Integrity, EdDSA/ECDSA over RDFC-1.0 via @jeswr/solid-vc). verifyMembershipCredential() verifies FAIL-CLOSED against the verifier's trust anchors: signature, expiry, issuer-binding, assertedBy==issuer, status in accepted set (default Active), expected federation/app (anti-replay), and an optional delegation chain (fedtrust:DelegationCredential links) to a trusted anchor. Composes @jeswr/solid-vc (proof-suite seam) + @jeswr/federation-registry (fedreg: Membership vocab) — duplicates neither. CLIENT-SIDE only; server-side membership ENFORCEMENT is a CORE-PSS decision flagged for the maintainer, not built here.
